data.title: [7eb8-af48] GREEN: Final absolute-zero verification across all file types
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Run all verification tests and the comprehensive grep to confirm absolute zero plugins/dso refs.

## Verification steps
1. bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh → exit 0
2. bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh → exit 0
3. bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh → exit 0
4. bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh → exit 0
5. grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ → MUST return empty (absolute zero)
6. Confirm no .py migration scripts exist under plugins/dso/:
   ! ls plugins/dso/scripts/migrate_*.py 2>/dev/null
7. Confirm allowlist relocated:
   test -f .claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
   ! test -f plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ returns ZERO lines
  Verify: test -z "$(grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/)"
- [ ] All 4 verification tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh && bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh && bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh && bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh
- [ ] No migration scripts under plugins/dso/
  Verify: test -z "$(ls plugins/dso/scripts/migrate_*.py 2>/dev/null)"
